case_title: WENDY J. FISHER VS. TRUE NORTH SURVEYING, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TRUE NORTH SURVEYING, INC.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF FILED BY FISHER, WENDY J. TRUE NORTH SURVEYING, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $950.00 FILED BY FISHER, WENDY J. AS TO DEFENDANT TRUE NORTH SURVEYING, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-27-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FISHER, WENDY J. AS TO DEFENDANT TRUE NORTH SURVEYING, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF -SIGNED SERVED NOV-05-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TRUE NORTH SURVEYING, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER PROGRESS REPORT OF 12/27/13. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-27-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-14-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. "DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF $700 ON OR BEFORE JANUARY 27, 2014." PER JPT JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY DONNA DE SOUZA - PRESIDENT.
